chapter_title: Operation of Authorized Emergency Vehicles & Certain Other Vehicles
text: Except as provided by Section 546.004 (Exceptions to Signal Requirement) , the operator of an authorized emergency vehicle engaging in conduct permitted by Section 546.001 (Permissible Conduct) shall use, at the discretion of the operator in accordance with policies of the department or the local government that employs the operator, audible or visual signals that meet the pertinent requirements of Sections 547.305 (Restrictions on Use of Lights) and 547.702 (Additional Equipment Requirements for Authorized Emergency Vehicles) .
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 546. Operation of Authorized Emergency Vehicles & Certain Other Vehicles
##### § 546.003 — Audible or Visual Signals Required

Except as provided by Section 546.004 (Exceptions to Signal Requirement) , the operator of an authorized emergency vehicle engaging in conduct permitted by Section 546.001 (Permissible Conduct) shall use, at the discretion of the operator in accordance with policies of the department or the local government that employs the operator, audible or visual signals that meet the pertinent requirements of Sections 547.305 (Restrictions on Use of Lights) and 547.702 (Additional Equipment Requirements for Authorized Emergency Vehicles) .

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*
